videos.headline: The fumble recovery from Eastern Michigan is must see
videos.description: On 4th-and-21, Ball State's Marquez Cooper has the ball bounce out of his hands and into the grasp of Eastern Michigan's Layne Hatcher for a wild fumble recovery.
